title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Teach For India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Teach For India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Teach For India family as a Teacher in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!
